title: Asynchronous Event Generation
scenario: Write a code snippet that generates a sequence of asynchronous events based on a set of input parameters. The events should be generated using a specific asynchronous programming library.
constraints: Must use a specific asynchronous programming library (e.g. asyncio)
Must include at least three different event types (e.g. timer, network request, GUI update)
Must be under 50 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated code is syntactically correct.
Check that the code meets the constraints of using the specified asynchronous library and including at least three event types.
Evaluate the correctness of the asynchronous logic used in the code.
